# Horizen Documentation

> Developer documentation for Horizen — an EVM-native L3 on Base with compliant, verifiable privacy through VELA.

## Horizen Chain

- [What is Horizen Chain?](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/overview/what-is-horizen): Overview of Horizen as an EVM-identical L3 built on Base
- [The L3 Architecture](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/overview/l3-architecture): Technical overview of Horizen's OP Stack L3 architecture
- [Horizen's Architecture](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/overview/architecture): Deep dive into the full system architecture
- [Mainnet Configuration](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/network/mainnet): RPC endpoints, chain ID, and explorer for Horizen mainnet
- [Testnet Configuration](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/network/testnet): RPC endpoints, chain ID, faucet, and explorer for Horizen testnet
- [Block Explorer](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/network/block-explorer): Guide to the Horizen block explorer
- [Faucet](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/network/faucet): Get testnet ETH from the Horizen faucet
- [Deploy with Foundry](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/deploy-contracts/using-foundry): Deploy smart contracts on Horizen using Foundry
- [Deploy with Hardhat](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/deploy-contracts/using-hardhat): Deploy smart contracts on Horizen using Hardhat
- [Verify a Contract](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/deploy-contracts/verify-contract): Verify deployed contracts on the Horizen explorer
- [Gas on Horizen](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/tokens-and-gas/gas-on-horizen): ETH gas fees and the L2+L1 fee model
- [ZEN Token](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/tokens-and-gas/zen-token): The ZEN governance token on Horizen
- [USDC.e on Horizen](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/tokens-and-gas/usdc): USDC.e bridged stablecoin details
- [cBTC on Horizen](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/tokens-and-gas/cbtc): Coinbase-wrapped BTC on Horizen
- [How Bridging Works](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/bridging/how-bridging-works): Native OP Stack bridge mechanics
- [Bridge USDC.e](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/bridging/bridge-usdc): Bridge USDC.e using the Hydra OFT framework
- [JSON-RPC Endpoints](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/api-reference/json-rpc): Standard and OP Stack JSON-RPC methods
- [Supported Wallets & Tools](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/api-reference/supported-wallets): Compatible wallets and developer tools
- [Network & Contract Addresses](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/api-reference/contract-addresses): Key contract addresses on Horizen
- [Subgraph Indexing (Goldsky)](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/integrations/goldsky): Index onchain data with Goldsky subgraphs
- [Multisig Wallets (Den)](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/integrations/multisig): Multisig via Den and Safe contracts
- [Oracles (Stork)](https://docs.horizen.io/horizen-chain/integrations/stork-oracle): Integrate Stork price oracles

## VELA

- [What is VELA?](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/overview/what-is-vela): Introduction to VELA — confidential, auditable execution via TEEs
- [How VELA Works](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/overview/how-vela-works): Architecture and execution model of VELA
- [VELA vs. Smart Contracts](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/overview/vela-vs-smart-contracts): Key differences between VELA and standard EVM contracts
- [Prerequisites](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/getting-started/prerequisites): Requirements for VELA development
- [Local Environment Setup](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/getting-started/local-environment-setup): Set up a local VELA dev environment with Docker
- [Your First Confidential App](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/getting-started/hello-world): Build a hello-world confidential application
- [Current Limitations](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/limitations/limitations): What VELA doesn't support yet
- [What the Team is Working On](https://docs.horizen.io/vela/limitations/what-team-is-working-on): Upcoming VELA features and roadmap

## Tutorials

- [Deploy an ERC-20 Token](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/horizen-chain/deploy-erc20): Full tutorial — ERC-20 deployment with Foundry and Hardhat
- [Deploy an NFT Collection](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/horizen-chain/deploy-nft-collection): Deploy an ERC-721 NFT collection on Horizen
- [Bridge from Base](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/horizen-chain/bridge-from-base): Move assets from Base to Horizen
- [Set Up a Multisig](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/integrations/setup-multisig): Create and manage a multisig wallet with Den
- [Connect Stork Oracle](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/integrations/connect-stork-oracle): Integrate Stork price feeds into your contracts
- [Index with Goldsky](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/integrations/index-with-goldsky): Index your Horizen contracts with Goldsky subgraphs
- [Build a Confidential ERC-20](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/vela/build-confidential-erc20): Create a privacy-preserving ERC-20 with VELA
- [KYC-Gated Token Transfer](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/vela/kyc-gated-token-transfer): Implement KYC-gated transfers with VELA
- [Add Audit Authority](https://docs.horizen.io/tutorials/vela/add-audit-authority): Add audit authority to a VELA smart contract

## Governance

- [About](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/01-overview/about): Overview of Horizen DAO governance
- [Guiding Values](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/01-overview/guiding_values): Core principles of the Horizen DAO
- [Constitution](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/01-overview/constitution): DAO rules and binding agreements
- [Communication Channels](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/01-overview/communication_channels): Community communication platforms
- [Proposal Categories](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/proposal_categories): Types of governance proposals
- [Voting Process](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/03-voting_process/voting_process): How voting works for ZenIPs
- [Quick Voting Guide](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/03-voting_process/quick_voting_guide): Quick reference for participating in votes
- [Foundational Documents](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/04-reference/foundational_docs): Key governance documents
- [Submit or Vote](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/04-reference/submit_vote): How to submit and vote on proposals
- [Join the Discussion](https://docs.horizen.io/governance/04-reference/join_discussion): Participate in DAO discussions

## Migration

- [Migration Overview](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/01-overview): Summary of Horizen's chain migration to Base
- [Preparing Old Chain Nodes](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/02-preparing-old-chain-nodes): Node preparation steps for migration
- [Migration Start](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/03-migration-start): Hard-fork activation and migration start point
- [Dump Execution](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/04-dump-execution): Data dump process details
- [Data Loading](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/05-data-loading): Loading migrated balances into smart contracts
- [Migration Check](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/06-migration-check): Verify the migration was successful
- [Claiming ZEN](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/07-claiming-zen): Claim migrated ZEN tokens
- [Smart Contracts](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/08-smart-contracts): Migration smart contract details
- [Migration Tools](https://docs.horizen.io/migration/09-migration-tools): Tools for the token claim process
